items.title: Complete ACH form for North Mill Equipment
items.summary: North Mill Equipment Finance needs a completed ACH agreement form with a voided check from the new VYVE CLT checkbook to process May payment and update auto-pay.
items.actionNeeded: Sign the ACH form, attach a voided check from new VYVE CLT checkbook, and return to North Mill Equipment Finance.

items.title: Connect new bank account for BTL payment
items.summary: MMP Capital payment of $5,177.54 for BTL Industries Emface equipment is past due (was due 5/15). Bank flagged original account; need to connect new account to make payment.
items.actionNeeded: Get details from Jack Miller to connect new bank account and process overdue payment.

items.title: Aging Well Podcast episode links available
items.summary: Jeff Armstrong shared links to Dr. Haas's podcast episode and clips. Episode goes public May 31st on all platforms.
items.actionNeeded: Review episode links for promotional planning ahead of May 31st public release.
